content: If we map Self-Refine’s iterative, unsupervised self-feedback loop onto Reflexion’s dynamic self-reflective memory system, we can build a tiered autonomous agent architecture that first refines immediate outputs and then consolidates high-quality refined outcomes into long-term reflective memory to improve future task performance. This creates a two-layer self-improvement cycle that eliminates the need for both external supervision and static curated training data entirely.
